arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 3-2 Leganes; 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Played the pass to Arda that drew the penalty, scored a poacher’s goal to level the game, and was influential throughout. Kylian Mbappe scores a brace to help Madrid secure a nervy 3-2 victory.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold could snub Real Madrid and stay at Liverpool on one condition
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold could still decide to remain at Liverpool on one major condition according to former defender Stephen Warnock despite expectation England star will join Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid: Bayer Leverkusen boss addresses future as Carlo Ancelotti exit to Brazil rumoured
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso addresses his future amidst speculation that he will be leaving Germany to become the next Real Madrid manager.

arts.ttl: Manchester United braced for 'Real Madrid bid' for key Ruben Amorim star as financial problems mount
arts.sum: Manchester United will reportedly have to brace themselves for a bid from Real Madrid for one of their key stars amidst severe financial constraints at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 3 - 2 Leganes
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Leah Revelle, and Mehedi Hassan discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd captain Fernandes emerges as Real Madrid target
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 3-2 Leganés (29 de Mar., 2025) Resultado Final

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “I can’t remember a game in which we haven’t suffered”
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the win against Leganes at the Santiago Bernabeu on Saturday. Given what we did in the first half, we didn’t deserve them, but they caught us out on two counterattacks and, without balance, they scored.”

arts.ttl: Real Madrid target Man Utd's Fernandes - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid plot £90m move for Man Utd captain Bruno Fernandes, Man City are interested in Barcelona midfielder Pedri and Chelsea are keen on Barca defender Jules Kounde.

arts.ttl: Mbappé nets twice to maintain Madrid title hopes
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé struck twice to guide Real Madrid to a 3-2 home win over relegation-threatened Leganes on Saturday.
